title: Inbound press inquiries become a live opportunity register — a high-stakes inquiry STOPS at a human gate, and the public view never leaks sender PII.

beats.name: cold-boot
beats.caption: the press desk lights up · gateway → relevance filters → opportunity register → briefing

beats.name: quiet
beats.caption: dim skip pulses · nothing changed · cost flat near zero

beats.name: pr-blast-dark
beats.caption: HERO: a PR blast lands · its relevance filter marks it irrelevant · the `qualified` facet stays NULL · the register never wakes (the dark lane)

beats.name: human-gate
beats.caption: HERO: a HIGH-importance partnership inquiry · the register updates AND the briefing stops at needs_human · auto_reply:false · a human must own the reply

beats.name: self-tick
beats.caption: self-tick audit floor · the briefing re-checks itself · no edges, no cost

beats.name: final-quiet
beats.caption: it goes quiet again · the gate holds · the public view carries kind + ask, never the sender · cost back to flat
